bead.title: Stage 4.18: cut v0.6.0-alpha20 release
bead.description: Final release bead. Run full manual regression: start server, navigate every page, verify each subscription fires, claim a bead, create a bead, edit a document, watch a worker log stream. Build binary, install to /home/erik/bin/ddx, restart ddx-server systemd unit, confirm `ddx status` shows new version, confirm new UI loads. Tag v0.6.0-alpha20 with release notes. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 4 bead #52.
bead.acceptance: (1) Completion note lists EVERY manual regression step performed with its outcome. (2) `git tag -l v0.6.0-alpha20` shows the tag. (3) `/home/erik/bin/ddx status` shows v0.6.0-alpha20. (4) `systemctl --user status ddx-server` shows running on new binary. (5) MANUAL: load the new UI, confirm it works.
